jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group:
Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kokilaben Dhirubhai Ambani Hospital Global Group!
